rules.title: Exclusive Operator Conflict
rules.description: allinurl, allintitle, and allintext operators cannot be combined with other operators
rules.rationale: Google treats these as exclusive operators that ignore other search modifiers
rules.message: Cannot combine {operator} with other operators. Use multiple {singleOperator} instead.
rules.suggestion: Replace 'allinurl:admin login' with 'inurl:admin inurl:login'

rules.title: Query Length Exceeded
rules.description: Query exceeds the effective word limit for search engines
rules.rationale: Google effectively processes ~32 words. Excess terms may be ignored.
rules.message: Query has {wordCount} words. Google may ignore terms beyond ~32 words.
rules.suggestion: Split into multiple focused queries or remove less critical terms

rules.title: Query Character Limit
rules.description: Query exceeds recommended character limit
rules.rationale: URLs have practical length limits. Very long queries may be truncated.
rules.message: Query is {charCount} characters. May be truncated by search engine.
rules.suggestion: Reduce query complexity or split into multiple searches

rules.title: Excessive OR List
rules.description: OR lists with many terms may cause unpredictable results
rules.rationale: Google may truncate or simplify queries with >5 OR terms
rules.message: OR list has {termCount} terms. Results may be unpredictable beyond 5 terms.
rules.suggestion: Split into multiple queries or prioritize most important terms

rules.title: Unsupported Operator
rules.description: Operator is not supported by the target search engine
rules.rationale: Different search engines support different operator syntaxes
rules.message: {operator} is not supported by {engine}. Query will not work as expected.
rules.suggestion: Remove operator or switch to a supported alternative

rules.title: Deprecated Operator
rules.description: Operator functionality has been reduced or deprecated
rules.rationale: Some operators like cache: have reduced functionality in 2025

deprecatedOperators.note: Google is phasing out cache: in favor of Internet Archive links

rules.message: {operator} has {status} functionality. {note}
rules.suggestion: Consider alternative approaches for this information

rules.title: Broad Query Warning
rules.description: Query has no site: restriction and may return excessive results
rules.rationale: Unscoped queries return global results, which may not be useful for targeted OSINT
rules.message: Query has no site: scope. Results will be global and may overwhelm analysis.
rules.suggestion: Add site:target.com to focus results on specific target

rules.title: Unbalanced Quotes
rules.description: Phrase has unbalanced quotation marks
rules.rationale: Unbalanced quotes cause parsing errors and unexpected results
rules.message: Unbalanced quotation marks in query. Phrase matching will fail.
rules.suggestion: Ensure all phrases have matching opening and closing quotes

rules.title: Unbalanced Parentheses
rules.description: Query has unbalanced parentheses for grouping
rules.rationale: Unbalanced parentheses break boolean grouping logic
rules.message: Unbalanced parentheses: {openParens} opening, {closeParens} closing.
rules.suggestion: Match all opening parentheses with closing parentheses

rules.title: Empty Operator Value
rules.description: Operator has no value specified
rules.rationale: Operators require values to function
rules.message: {operator}: has no value. Query will fail or return unexpected results.
rules.suggestion: Add a value after the operator, e.g., site:example.com

rules.title: Redundant Operator
rules.description: Same operator is used multiple times with same value
rules.rationale: Duplicate operators waste query space and add no value
rules.message: Duplicate {operator}:{value} found. Remove redundant instance.
rules.suggestion: Remove duplicate operator to simplify query

rules.title: Credential Search Pattern
rules.description: Query appears designed to find exposed credentials
rules.rationale: Credential discovery requires ethical handling
rules.message: Query targets credential exposure. Ensure authorized use only.
rules.suggestion: Use findings for responsible disclosure, not exploitation
rules.legalContext: Accessing discovered credentials may violate CFAA/CMA even if publicly indexed

rules.title: PII Search Pattern
rules.description: Query appears designed to find personally identifiable information
rules.rationale: PII collection has legal restrictions under GDPR/CCPA
rules.message: Query targets PII. Ensure compliance with privacy regulations.
rules.suggestion: Document lawful basis for PII collection under applicable regulations
rules.legalContext: GDPR/CCPA impose restrictions on PII processing

rules.title: Admin Panel Discovery
rules.description: Query targets administrative interfaces
rules.rationale: Admin panel discovery should be for authorized testing only
rules.message: Query targets admin interfaces. Do not attempt authentication without authorization.
rules.suggestion: Document as attack surface finding; do not attempt access
rules.legalContext: Unauthorized authentication attempts may violate computer crime laws

rules.title: Multiple Site Operators
rules.description: Multiple site: operators create implicit OR, not AND
rules.rationale: Common misunderstanding: site:a.com site:b.com returns results from EITHER domain
rules.message: Multiple site: operators found. Results will include both domains (OR behavior).
rules.suggestion: Use explicit (site:a.com OR site:b.com) for clarity, or run separate queries

rules.title: Wildcard in Phrase
rules.description: Asterisk wildcard used within quoted phrase
rules.rationale: Wildcards work differently in phrases vs. bare terms
rules.message: Wildcard (*) in phrase matches any word. Ensure this is intended.
rules.suggestion: "password * admin" matches 'password [any word] admin'

rules.title: Invalid Filetype
rules.description: Filetype operator value may not be a valid indexed extension
rules.rationale: Not all file extensions are indexed by search engines
rules.message: filetype:{value} may not be indexed. Common types: pdf, doc, xls, sql, log, env
rules.suggestion: Verify the extension is commonly indexed or test with known files

rules.title: Boolean Operator Case
rules.description: Boolean operators must be uppercase
rules.rationale: Lowercase 'or' and 'and' are treated as search terms, not operators
rules.message: Boolean operators must be uppercase: OR, AND, NOT. Found lowercase '{operator}'.
rules.suggestion: Use 'term1 OR term2' not 'term1 or term2'

rules.title: Negation Scope Warning
rules.description: Negation operator (-) only applies to immediately following term
rules.rationale: '-term1 term2' negates only term1, not both terms
rules.message: Negation (-) applies only to the immediate next term. '-term1 term2' ≠ '-(term1 term2)'
rules.suggestion: Use '-(term1 OR term2)' to negate multiple terms, or '-term1 -term2' for each

rules.title: URL Encoding in inurl
rules.description: Special characters in inurl: may need consideration
rules.rationale: URL-encoded characters may or may not match depending on indexing
rules.message: inurl: contains special characters. Matching may be inconsistent.
rules.suggestion: Try both encoded (%20) and unencoded (space) versions if results vary

error.label: Error
error.description: Query will fail or produce incorrect results

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Query may produce unexpected or suboptimal results

info.label: Info
info.description: Informational note about query behavior or ethics
